title: palmijuncus borneensis
parts: Palmijuncus borneensis has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and flowers, which are used in traditional medicine. The roots of Palmijuncus borneensis contain medicinal constituents like flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The leaves of this plant contain compounds like saponins and phenolic acids, which have been found to have antioxidant and anti-diabetic effects. The flowers of Palmijuncus borneensis contain medicinal constituents like glycosides and volatile oils, which have been used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
